text.title: Foreign Client Kickoff Checklist Procedure
text.summary: Six-step procedure to apply Foreign Client Kickoff Checklist end-to-end from typed inputs to a sign-off-ready checklist.

step.name: confirm-applicability
step.input: AGENTS.md Applies-If / Skip-If predicates + current task brief
step.action: Evaluate every Applies-If item (ALL must hold) and every Skip-If item (ANY kills it). If any Skip-If fires, abort and emit a "wrong-tool" note instead.
step.decision-gate: If skip, STOP. Do not emit the checklist.

step.name: gather-typed-inputs
step.action: Open each input artefact and record name + source path in the working set. Inputs that cannot be opened are flagged; do not synthesise from prior knowledge.
step.output: `inputs_used[]` populated with name + source per row
step.decision-gate: If a required input is missing, STOP and surface the gap to the operator.

step.name: draft-decision
step.input: Working input set + decision tree from `content/06-decision-tree.xml`
step.action: Walk the decision tree from root question to leaf conclusion. Record the rule id at the conclusion. Draft the decision statement referencing at least one input by name.

step.name: self-check-against-contract
step.action: Walk the JSON Schema: every required key present, no forbidden pattern matches, all transformations applied. Run `scripts/validate-foreign-client-kickoff-checklist.py --file draft.json` locally.
step.decision-gate: If contract_passed = false, return to step 3 and repair the named violation.

step.name: owner-attribution
step.action: Set `owner` to a single named human or named rotating role. Reject any plural-pronoun owner. Add a 30-day refresh trigger to the agent's task queue.
step.output: Owner field set; refresh trigger recorded

step.name: store-and-handoff
step.action: Write the artefact to the storage location named in Prerequisites. Notify the named downstream consumer. Bump version per the change-class table (patch/minor/major).
step.output: checklist live; consumer notified; version + last_reviewed advanced
